comb_oracle_cross_check.interpretation: post-P&R area ratio 1.6222 exceeds the synth-stage 1.516x by 7.0% — this is the P&R-stage EDA cost (timing-repair buffers + clock tree + routing) that comb T1A's inequality budgets as Δ_router; NOT a contradiction of comb's synth oracle (different stage). Power ratio 3.507x is a far larger degree-6 penalty than area.

verdict.rationale: Establishes the measured physical EDA-cost RHS of comb T1A's 승리 부등식 (area 1.62x, power ~3.5x, timing degraded post-P&R). The NoC-sim LHS (degree-6 latency benefit) must clear THIS cost. Single (PDK, SDC, util) point, first-pass flow, timing not closed — explicitly NOT a regime claim; g3 no-over-claim; measurement_gate GATE_OPEN.

provenance.atlas_cite_block: @cite hexa-arch:rfc_002 §3 pair-record; design.md D7; comb T3_DESIGN_FINAL.md §2-§4
scope_caveats: router-block post-P&R only; fabric F1/F2 = NoC-sim side
first-pass ORFS, timing not closed at 200MHz SDC
